commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content:
And he took Gessur, and Aram the towns of Jair, and Canath, and the villages thereof, threescore cities, all these are (d) the sons of Machir the father of Galaad.
(d) By sons as often elsewhere, are understood nephews and other offspring.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Princes, heads of families, or officers of the army, chap. xxv. 1. (Menochius)
